generated_by: CADOS Wave-0 F5 (diff-scope legislation + diff_id basis-hash + handle-independence fix)
purpose: Legislates which entities tools/cad_diff.py's compute_diff() is even eligible to diff -- H-R18 / D1_tier_dag F5 / PLAN.md F5. Consumed by cad_diff.load_diff_scope_config()/_resolve_diff_scope(); compute_diff(diff_scope=None) resolves default_scope from here. Not consumed for tolerance -- see cad_diff.default_tolerance_profile() (v2-A5), which is Python constants, not config.
paul_decision: Default critical-path scope = modelspace-only; freeze scope = full_database. Both supported, chosen by config (PLAN.md F5 Paul-decision node, SEED open Q#1/#2).

modelspace_entities_only.description: Keep only entities whose IR entity.space is "model" (ir_builder's own default when a producer omits space). Paperspace/layout entities and any future symbol-table/block-definition-shaped record are out of scope. This is the default critical-path scope: fast, and structurally immune to blank-seed noise because seed default records (layers, linetypes, text styles, dimstyles, block defs) never live in modelspace.

full_database.description: Keep entities from every space (no space filter) -- the freeze scope. Additionally subtract any entity matching the seed_baseline_mask passed to compute_diff(): the blank-seed's default symbol-table/block-definition records (fixtures/blank_seed.dwg, node F4) that would otherwise show up as diff noise (H-R18 measured on the pilot seed: ~91 layers, 8 text styles, 6 dim styles, 18 linetypes, 140 block defs). T5 (symbol-table & dictionary record-diff) is a prerequisite for a genuinely complete full_database diff; until it lands this scope only widens cad_diff.py's existing entities[] population (no space filter) plus honest mask subtraction -- it does not yet diff symbol_tables/block_definitions/dictionaries themselves.

seed_baseline_mask.match_semantics: A mask entry WITHOUT a "geometry" key matches ANY geometry for its (dxf_name, layer) pair (a symbol-table-record-style wildcard -- most seed default records are not shaped like a graphical entity at all). A mask entry WITH a "geometry" key matches only entities whose geometry fingerprint is equal within the active tolerance profile (an exact graphical-entity match).
seed_baseline_mask.source: Not yet minted -- node F4/F4b mint fixtures/blank_seed.dwg (+ its symbol-table baseline) separately. Until then callers pass seed_baseline_mask explicitly to compute_diff(); no mask means no subtraction (no-fake-success: this module never fabricates an exclusion it cannot justify).
